analysis.database_note: Embeddings database had only 5 published articles (no fiz category articles). Manual semantic analysis performed.
unique_angles: IIS-specific tax consequences (dosrochnoe zakrytie, vozvrat vychieta) - NOT covered in konkursnaya-massa
NRD (Nacionalnyj raschetnyj depozitarij) as info source - specific to securities market
Investment assets focus (stocks, PIFs, brokers) vs. general property inventory
Tax liability calculation (st. 219.1 NK RF penalties) - unique legal angle
overlap_with_konkursnaya_massa: Basic 'what goes into competitive mass' concept (~30% semantic overlap but different asset class)
Structural parallel: both have 'forbidden actions' blocks, but draft focuses on presale transactions, konkursnaya on post-filing actions
FAQ section structure (parallel but non-identical content)
structural_differences: Draft: Aktsii → IIS-tax → NRD-torgi → risks → kritichnyye sluchai → FAQ → final
Konkursnaya: Kratkiy otvet → chto vklyuchaetsya → chto zaschishcheno → chto nelzya → FAQ → chto delat
H2 header sequences do NOT match (0% structural overlap by SequenceMatcher)

content_differentiation.conclusion: Draft is narrowly specialized; no significant semantic cannibalization detected

note: Embedding stored in data/embeddings.sqlite with published=0. Database syncing issue noted: 36 published articles in /articles/fiz/ but only 5 total published entries in embeddings DB. Recommend rebuilding embeddings index.
